n, bx = map(int, input().split())
x = list(map(int, input().split()))
m, by = map(int, input().split())
y = list(map(int, input().split()))


def convert(num, base):
    res = []
    while num:
        res.append(str(num % base))
        num //= base
    return int(''.join(res[::-1]))


print('<' if convert(x, bx) < convert(y, by) else '>' if convert(x, bx) > convert(y, by) else '=')
